text:
こんなにたくさん……
一体、どれだけの人が巻き込まれて……

……考えるのはあとだ。
行くぞ、あのバカを止める。

This is awful... How many people have been
dragged into this?

We can mull it over later.
Let's move. We have to stop that fool.
